vocab.meaning: định mệnh/tiếng gọi của cuộc đời
vocab.example: Studying medicine wasn't just a career choice for me; it truly felt like a calling in life to help others.
I opted for International Relations because I was eager to broaden my horizons and understand global dynamics.

vocab.meaning: phần lớn nhất của cái gì đó
vocab.example: The lion's share of my interest has always been in sustainable energy, which led me to choose Environmental Engineering.

vocab.meaning: điều gì đó gợi suy nghĩ sâu sắc
vocab.example: A documentary I saw in high school gave me plenty of food for thought, ultimately steering me towards Social Work.

vocab.meaning: trở thành hiện thực/đạt kết quả
vocab.example: My dream of becoming an architect is finally starting to come to fruition now that I'm in my final year of study.

vocab.word: be a feather in one's cap
vocab.meaning: là một thành tựu đáng tự hào
vocab.example: Securing a place in this highly competitive Law program was a feather in my cap after years of hard work.
I chose Physics because I don't mind burning the midnight oil to solve complex equations that fascinate me.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt mức mong đợi
vocab.example: I'm willing to go the extra mile in my Psychology studies because I'm genuinely invested in mental health advocacy.

vocab.meaning: nối nghiệp/theo bước chân ai đó
vocab.example: Deciding to major in Finance allowed me to follow in my father's footsteps while still carving out my own niche.

vocab.meaning: không có giới hạn cho sự thành công
vocab.example: With a degree in Data Science, I feel that the sky is the limit in terms of future career opportunities.
